name: Paris Carnival
description: A major event where the streets are filled with colour, music, and costumes, featuring a large colorful parade that continues into the night.

name: Carnival of Nice
description: One of the largest carnivals in the world, featuring 18 floats, a Parade of Lights at Place Masséna, and the Burning of the King ceremony.

name: Carnival of Dunkirk
description: A historic tradition dating to the 17th Century, known for outrageous costumes, colorful umbrellas, and giant puppets called reuzes, culminating in the Trois Joyeuses.
